findings.title: Total Budget Over Limit
findings.why: The budgeted total is $53,200 while the overall budget is $50,000, exceeding by $3,200. This suggests an unrealistic financial plan.
findings.do: Review and adjust budget line items to align with the overall budget.

findings.title: Duplicate Line Items
findings.why: 'DJ Amir' appears twice under the music category. This could lead to double payment.
findings.do: Verify and consolidate the entries for 'DJ Amir' to prevent overpayment.

findings.title: Overdue Unpaid Amounts
findings.why: Bella Vista Hall and Golden Hour Photography have overdue payments, risking contractual issues.
findings.do: Prioritize payments to settle overdue amounts with vendors to avoid potential service disruption.

findings.title: Per-line Budget Overruns
findings.why: Bella Vista Hall and Golden Hour Photography have committed more than what was initially budgeted.
findings.do: Discuss with vendors or adjust the budget to accommodate these overruns.
